diagnostics.name: illegal-state-exception
diagnostics.message_template: Illegal state detected in method execution.
diagnostics.description: Occurs when a method is invoked at an inappropriate time.

diagnostics.name: file-not-found
diagnostics.description: Occurs when attempting to access a file that does not exist.

diagnostics.name: arithmetic-exception
diagnostics.description: Occurs when illegal arithmetic operations are performed (e.g., division by zero).

diagnostics.name: index-out-of-bounds
diagnostics.description: Occurs when accessing list or collection with invalid index.

diagnostics.name: illegal-access
diagnostics.description: Occurs when attempting to access private members incorrectly.

diagnostics.name: null-pointer-exception
diagnostics.description: Occurs when trying to use an object reference that has not been initialized.

diagnostics.name: resource-leak
diagnostics.description: Resource (like a file or scanner) is opened but not closed.

diagnostics.name: insecure-random
diagnostics.description: Use SecureRandom instead of Random for security-sensitive applications.

diagnostics.name: empty-catch-block
diagnostics.description: Exceptions are caught but not handled or logged.

diagnostics.name: dead-code
diagnostics.description: Code that will never be executed.

diagnostics.name: string-equality-operator
diagnostics.message_template: Used == to compare String objects. Use .equals() instead.
diagnostics.description: In Java, == compares object references, not string content. Strings must be compared using .equals() or Objects.equals() to check value equality.

IllegalStateException.explanation: Illegal state detected in method execution.
IllegalStateException.suggestion: Check the object state before calling this method.

FileNotFoundException.suggestion: Verify the file path exists and is accessible.

ArithmeticException.suggestion: Check for division by zero or overflow conditions.

ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException.suggestion: Verify the index is within [0, size-1].

NullPointerException.suggestion: Ensure the object is initialized before use (e.g., check for null).

ResourceLeak.suggestion: Ensure the resource is closed in a finally block or use try-with-resources.

EmptyCatchBlock.suggestion: Add logging or handling logic to the catch block.

DeadCode.suggestion: Remove the unreachable code or fix the logic.

StringEqualityOperator.explanation: Using == to compare String objects compares references, not values.
StringEqualityOperator.suggestion: Replace == with .equals() for String comparison (e.g., a.equals(b)).
